arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Man City - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Newcastle United in the Premier League this weekend with Pep Guardiola's side having to cope without the injured Rodri

arts.ttl: Star man gamble, negative impact & chance to shine as Howe makes key NUFC call
arts.sum: We've yet to really see the £15m man in action but I, and a lot of other supporters, were impressed with his display during the striker's only start for Newcastle in the Sela Cup. Now, of course, Ligue 1's Brest is a world away from Manchester City but I don't want to risk a serious injury to Alexander Isak and I think you should keep Anthony Gordon on either flank. There's a big call for Eddie Howe to make at St James' Park this weekend as Newcastle United attempt to tackle champions Manchester City with uncertainty surrounding who will be named up top for the Magpies.

arts.ttl: Key element Eddie Howe is factoring into Sandro Tonali's Newcastle United selection
arts.sum: When asked why Tonali had played two lots of 90 minutes for Italy in the UEFA Nations League, Howe played down any difficulties with the player. Sandro Tonali was "mentally fatigued" when he returned from international duty with Italy earlier this month - hence the reason why Eddie Howe opted against starting him in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle won’t be happy as England international could join Liverpool for nearly half price
arts.sum: Liverpool are in the market for a new left-sided centre-back and the Reds could pick up Crystal Palace’s Marc Guehi for nearly half price next summer due to the player’s contract situation at Selhurst Park. Virgil van Dijk is out of contract at Anfield in 2025 and the Merseyside club have begun thinking of long-term […] The post Newcastle won’t be happy as England international could join Liverpool for nearly half price appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle blow sparked my major Man City U-turn - now I'm undroppable
arts.sum: Manu Akanji has been at Manchester City for two seasons but is yet to play at Newcastle in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Manchester City 'eye-up move for £30m-rated Serie A star as Rodri replacement' - after Spaniard was ruled out for the season with a serious knee injury
arts.sum: Rodri, 28, suffered the problem during City's 2-2 draw against Arsenal on Sunday and following a series of tests this week, Pep Guardiola revealed on Friday that he had surgery in Madrid.

arts.ttl: Newcastle owners may have found a bargain after Everton price and debt suggestion
arts.sum: It is worth noting that Newcastle's owners have pumped in additional sums since the takeover - the Friedkin Group plan to do likewise at Everton - but the Toffees' purchase price will nonetheless dwarf the £305m the consortium paid nearly three years ago. It is approaching three years since Newcastle United's takeover - and the market suggests the Magpies' owners secured a relative bargain.

arts.ttl: Rodri replacement revealed as Man City seek damage limitation
arts.sum: The gravitas of Rodri’s situation was immediately obvious when the Man City midfielder stayed down after a challenge during the Arsenal game.
